title: Notice to property owners
doc_html:
§376. Notice to property owners

            Upon receipt of the deposit, certified copies of the petition, judgment, and the receipt for the deposit shall be served upon each property owner.

            Acts 2020, No. 229, §1, eff. June 11, 2020.
doc_text:
§376.  Notice to property owners
Upon receipt of the deposit, certified copies of the petition, judgment, and the receipt
for the deposit shall be served upon each property owner.
Acts 2020, No. 229, §1, eff. June 11, 2020.
